# `api.jobs.tracking.get`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/tracking` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.tracking.get(job_display_id: int) -> TrackingInfo
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs tracking get <job_display_id>
```

``GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/tracking``

## Response

Returns `TrackingInfo`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `status` | `Optional[str]` | no | Current tracking status |
| `location` | `Optional[str]` | no | Current location |
| `estimatedDelivery` | `Optional[str]` | no | ETA |
| `events` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Tracking event history |
| `carrierName` | `Optional[str]` | no | Carrier |
| `proNumber` | `Optional[str]` | no | PRO number |
| `statuses` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Tracking status entries with date, message, code |
| `success` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Whether the tracking lookup succeeded |
| `errorMessage` | `Optional[str]` | no | Error message if lookup failed |
